mapper.select:
/* RcpCombMgmtMapper.getRcpCombMgmtInfo */ SELECT REQ_SEQ ,COMB_TYPE_CD ,FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9036' , COMB_TYPE_CD) AS COMB_TYPE_NM ,M_CTN AS TEL1 , SUBSTR(M_CTN,0,3) AS TEL1_FN --전화번호 , SUBSTR(M_CTN,4,4) AS TEL1_MN --전화번호 , SUBSTR(M_CTN,8,4) AS TEL1_RN --전화번호 ,M_CUST_NM AS CSTMR_NAME ,M_CUST_BIRTH AS M_CUST_BIRTH ,M_SEX_CD ,M_SVC_CNTR_NO ,M_RATE_CD ,M_RATE_NM ,M_RATE_ADSVC_CD ,M_RATE_ADSVC_NM ,COMB_SVC_NO AS TEL2 , SUBSTR(COMB_SVC_NO,0,3) AS TEL2_FN --전화번호 , SUBSTR(COMB_SVC_NO,4,4) AS TEL2_MN --전화번호 , SUBSTR(COMB_SVC_NO,8,4) AS TEL2_RN --전화번호 ,COMB_SVC_CNTR_NO ,COMB_CUST_NM AS CSTMR_NAME2 ,COMB_BIRTH AS COMB_CUST_BIRTH ,COMB_SEX_CD ,FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9038' , COMB_TYPE_CD) AS COMB_DTL_TYPE_NM ,COMB_SOC_CD ,COMB_SOC_NM ,COMB_RATE_ADSVC_CD ,COMB_RATE_ADSVC_NM ,COMB_TGT_TYPE_CD ,FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9039' , COMB_TGT_TYPE_CD) AS COMB_TGT_TYPE_NM ,RSLT_CD ,FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9037' , RSLT_CD) AS RSLT_NM ,RSLT_MEMO ,SYS_DT ,REG_DT ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM FROM MCP_REQ_COMBINE@DL_MCP WHERE 1=1
AND REQ_SEQ = #{reqSeq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

/* RcpCombMgmtMapper.getRcpCombCntrInfo */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM -- 계약번호 , A.SUB_LINK_NAME -- 고객명 , CASE WHEN D.CUSTOMER_TYPE = 'B' THEN NULL WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(NVL(A.USER_SSN, ' ')), 7,1) IN ('1','2','5','6') THEN '19'||SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(NVL(A.USER_SSN, ' ')), 0,6) WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(NVL(A.USER_SSN, ' ')), 7,1) IN ('3','4','7','8') THEN '20'||SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(NVL(A.USER_SSN, ' ')), 0,6) END AS BIRTH --생년월일 , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO --전화번호 , SUBSTR(A.SUBSCRIBER_NO,0,3) AS CSTMR_TEL_FN --전화번호 , SUBSTR(A.SUBSCRIBER_NO,4,4) AS CSTMR_TEL_MN --전화번호 , SUBSTR(A.SUBSCRIBER_NO,8,4) AS CSTMR_TEL_RN --전화번호 , NVL(C.P_RATE_CD,'') AS LST_RATE_CD --요금제 , (SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = C.P_RATE_CD) AS LST_RATE_NM --요금제명 , CASE WHEN D.CUSTOMER_TYPE = 'B' THEN '03' WHEN SUBSTR(REPLACE(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(A.USER_SSN), '-', ''), 7, 1) IN ('1' , '3' , '5' , '7') THEN '01' WHEN SUBSTR(REPLACE(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(A.USER_SSN), '-', ''), 7, 1) IN ('2' , '4' , '6' , '8') THEN '02' END COMB_SEX_CD --성별 , C.R_RATE_CD --부가서비스 , (SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = C.R_RATE_CD) AS R_RATE_NM --부가서비스명 FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_REQUEST_DTL B , ( SELECT P_RATE_CD , R_RATE_CD FROM MSP_COMB_RATE_MAPP WHERE SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(APP_START_DT||'000000', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(APP_END_DT||'235959','YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) C , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO D WHERE 1=1 AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = D.CUSTOMER_ID AND B.LST_RATE_CD = C.P_RATE_CD(+)
AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

/* RcpCombMgmtMapper.getRcpCombParentRateCdInfo */ SELECT A.P_RATE_CD AS RATE_CD, PRATE.RATE_NM AS RATE_NM, A.R_RATE_CD AS RATE_ADSVC_CD, RRATE.RATE_NM AS RATE_ADSVC_NM, A.APP_START_DT, A.APP_END_DT, (SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = A.REGST_ID) AS REG_NM, TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM , 'YYYYMMDD' ) AS REGST_DTTM, (SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = A.RVISN_ID) AS RVISN_NM, TO_CHAR(A.RVISN_DTTM , 'YYYYMMDD' ) AS RVISN_DTTM FROM MSP_COMB_RATE_MAPP A , MSP_RATE_MST PRATE , MSP_RATE_MST RRATE WHERE A.P_RATE_CD = PRATE.RATE_CD AND A.R_RATE_CD = RRATE.RATE_CD AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(A.APP_START_DT||'000000', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(A.APP_END_DT||'235959','YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
AND A.P_RATE_CD = #{rateCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

/* RcpCombMgmtMapper.getRcpCombRelationRateCdInfo */ SELECT A.RATE_CD , A.RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST A WHERE 1=1 AND A.SERVICE_TYPE = 'R'
AND A.RATE_CD = #{rateCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: /* RcpCombMgmtMapper.insertRcpCombMgmtInfo */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQ_COMBINE@DL_MCP ( REQ_SEQ, COMB_TYPE_CD, M_CTN, M_CUST_NM, M_CUST_BIRTH, M_SEX_CD, M_SVC_CNTR_NO, M_RATE_CD , M_RATE_NM, M_RATE_ADSVC_CD, M_RATE_ADSVC_NM, COMB_SVC_NO, COMB_SVC_CNTR_NO, COMB_CUST_NM , COMB_BIRTH, COMB_SEX_CD, COMB_SOC_CD, COMB_SOC_NM, COMB_RATE_ADSVC_CD, COMB_RATE_ADSVC_NM , COMB_TGT_TYPE_CD, RSLT_CD, RSLT_MEMO, SYS_DT, REG_DT, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM ) VALUES( MCP_REQ_COMBINE_SEQ.NEXTVAL@DL_MCP /* seq */ , #{combTypeCd} /* 결합구분 01,02,03 */ , #{tel1} /* 모회선 전화번호 */ , #{cstmrName} /* 모회선 이름 */ , #{mCustBirth} /* 모회선 생년월일 */ , #{mSexCd} /* 모회선 성별코드 */ , #{mSvcCntrNo} /* 모회선 계약번호 */ , #{mRateCd} /* 모회선 상품코드 */ , #{mRateNm} /* 모회선 상품명 */ , #{mRateAdsvcCd} /* -- 부가서비스 코드 */ , #{mRateAdsvcNm} /* 부가서비스명 */ , #{tel2} /* 결합 전화번호 */ , #{combSvcCntrNo} /* 결합 계약번호 */ , #{cstmrName2} /* 결합 이름 */ , #{combCustBirth} /* 결합 생년월일 */ , #{combSexCd} /* 결합 성별코드 */ , #{combSocCd} /* 결합 상품 코드 */ , #{combSocNm} /* 결합 상품코드명 */ , #{combRateAdsvcCd} /* 결합 부가서비스코드 */ , #{combRateAdsvcNm} /* 결합 부가서비스명 */ , #{combTgtTypeCd} /* 상품가입 구분코드 */ , 'R' /* R 승인대기, S 승인완료 */ , '' /* 비고 */ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') /* 처리년월일 */ , SYSDATE /* 데이터 저장일 */ , #{regstId} /* 처리계정 */ , SYSDATE /* RVISN_DTTM */ )
mapper.update:
/* RcpCombMgmtMapper.updateRcpCombRslt */ UPDATE MCP_REQ_COMBINE@DL_MCP SET COMB_TYPE_CD = #{combTypeCd} /* 결합구분 01,02,03 */ , M_CTN = #{tel1} /* 모회선 전화번호 */ , M_CUST_NM = #{cstmrName} /* 모회선 이름 */ , M_CUST_BIRTH = #{mCustBirth} /* 모회선 생년월일 */ , M_SEX_CD = #{mSexCd} /* 모회선 성별코드 */ , M_SVC_CNTR_NO = #{mSvcCntrNo} /* 모회선 계약번호 */ , M_RATE_CD = #{mRateCd} /* 모회선 상품코드 */ , M_RATE_NM = #{mRateNm} /* 모회선 상품명 */ , M_RATE_ADSVC_CD = #{mRateAdsvcCd} /* 부가서비스 코드 */ , M_RATE_ADSVC_NM = #{mRateAdsvcNm} /* 부가서비스명 */ , COMB_SVC_NO = #{tel2} /* 결합 전화번호 */ , COMB_SVC_CNTR_NO = #{combSvcCntrNo} /* 결합 계약번호 */ , COMB_CUST_NM = #{cstmrName2} /* 결합 이름 */ , COMB_BIRTH = #{combCustBirth} /* 결합 생년월일 */ , COMB_SEX_CD = #{combSexCd} /* 결합 성별코드 */ , COMB_SOC_CD = #{combSocCd} /* 결합 상품 코드 */ , COMB_SOC_NM = #{combSocNm} /* 결합 상품코드명 */ , COMB_RATE_ADSVC_CD = #{combRateAdsvcCd} /* 결합 부가서비스코드 */ , COMB_RATE_ADSVC_NM = #{combRateAdsvcNm} /* 결합 부가서비스명 */ , COMB_TGT_TYPE_CD = #{combTgtTypeCd} /* 상품가입 구분코드 */
WHERE REQ_SEQ = #{reqSeq}
mapper.select: /* RcpCombMgmtMapper.getCombRateMappByRateCd */ SELECT P_RATE_CD AS pRateCd , R_RATE_CD AS rRateCd FROM MSP_COMB_RATE_MAPP WHERE P_RATE_CD = #{pRateCd} AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN APP_START_DT AND APP_END_DT AND ROWNUM = 1
